communications.subject: Re: Protocol Deviation — Subject 008 Missed C3D1 Visit Window
communications.preview: The visit window exceedance for Subject 008 (Cycle 3 Day 1) was due to a weather-related site closure on Feb 18-19. The patient presented on Feb 22 (3 days outside the ±3 day window). All protocol-required assessments were completed. A protocol deviation form has been submitted to the IRB and is attached...

communications.subject: Continuing Review — Protocol CNS-205-2024 v1.4
communications.preview: Please find attached the continuing review package for Protocol CNS-205-2024. Current enrollment: 5 of 8 target patients. No SAEs since last review. One protocol deviation (Subject 104, missed MRI window) reported and acknowledged. Study remains open to enrollment...
